LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK'S MOTION FOR ENTERING JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFENDANT PURSUANT TO CCP 664.6 IS GRANTED. Notice Of Motion And Motion For Entering Judgment Against Defendant Pursuant To Ccp 664.6
Off Calendar Aug-08-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. SIMON LEE, TEL. NO. (510) 220-3033 SPECIALLY APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK's Motion For Entering Judgment Against Defendant Pursuant To Ccp 664.6 is Granted. The court grants the motion to enter judgment against defendant in the amount of $9237.50. No opposition was filed. ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Ann Delgado, CSR # 11185, Tel. No. (951)764-4047
